# Complex Arithmetic

Complex arithmetic expression with operator precedence

```perl
$result = $a + $b * $c / $d - $e % $f;
```

# Expected Compilation Outcomes

## Complex Arithmetic

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$result = $a + $b * $c / $d - $e % $f;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$result = $a + $b * $c / $d - $e % $f;
```

### Inferred Perl Output

```perl
# Type inference not yet fully implemented
```
